examples: Makin said Mr. Coombes had gone to the police of his own volition.
We like to think that everything we do and everything we think is a product of our volition.
They have, in other words, given them volition.
Chalk one up for volition: Fenton graduated from high school early and began travelling soon afterward.
In a few blinks, the Jaguar had pulled itself completely back on course, seemingly of its own volition.
